rulings.Case Title: JASON MOMENT et al VS. 3130 PACIFIC LLC, A DISSOLVED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 18, 2013, line 1. PETITIONERS JASON MOMENT and JESSICA MOMENT's Motion For Order On Petition To Confirm Arb Award GRANTED. Opposition failed to show that arbitrator exceeded her powers within the meaning of CCP 1286.2(d) and Ahdout v. Hekmatjah (2013) 213 Cal.App.4th 21. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: MINDY FREILE VS. TIM LINCECUM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant Freile'S Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S July 26, 2013, Discovery Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 18, 2013, line 9. Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant Freile'S Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S July 26, 2013, Discovery Order DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 1008. No sanctions. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: ANNETTE HORNSBY VS. NEW CENTURY MORTGAGE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File 2nd Amended Compl; Memo Of Pts And Auth In Support Of Mtn
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 18, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE HORNSBY's Motion For Leave To File 2nd Amended Complaint Continued to September 24, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than September 17, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD WESTON VS. TOMMY K ABIB et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: And Motion To Compel Further Responsesto Form Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 18, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF HOWARD WESTON's Motion To Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories GRANTED. Defendant shall provide supplemental responses to Form Interrogatories 17.1 (to provide the missing phone number) and Special Interrogatories 3 (to clarify with respect to primary residence). Responses shall be received by Plaintiff's counsel no later than September 27, 2013.Plaitff's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $2,172.50 and shall be paid to Plaintiff's counsel by defendant or his counsel within 10 days of Notice of Entry of Order. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: DMG ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. ALCIDES VALLADARES PERLA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Reconsider Motion To Quash Writ Of Possession Exept As To Defendants Named In The Judgment; Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 18, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT JUAN GALINDO and RENE CASTRO's Motion To Reconsider Motion To Quash Writ Of Possession Except As To Defendants Named In The Judgment Continued to September 26, 2013 to be heard by Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS VS. SHABEZ GLENN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn In Support Of Mtn To Compel Attendance At Deposition And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 18, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT SHABEZ GLENN's Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And For Sanctions GRANTED as follows: (1) Arthur Hutton, Bernardo Hutton, William Hutton, Latisha Wood shall appear for depositions on September 25, 2013 on an alternate date agreeable to all counsel at 10:00 a.m.; 11:30 a.m.; 1:00 p.m. and 3:00 p.m. respectively; Sanctions are granted in the amount of $632.50 to be paid by Plaintiff and its counsel within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER J. COSTELLO VS. REBECCA JEAN ALONZI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Requests For Production Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defts And Their Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 18, 2013, line 6. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER COSTELLO's Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Requests For Production Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Their Attorney Continued to September 24, 2013 on Court's own motion.= (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: ARCHSTONE SOUTH MARKET, LLC VS. KING LEI AND ALLAN CHU INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 18, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT ALLAN CHU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Allegation of Daily damages is not a required element of Unlawful Detainer cause of action. Notice provided in the alternative is not fatal to the complaint where breach is non-curable. Richard v. Degen & Brody, Inc. (1985) 181 Cal.App.2d 289, 294 (disapproved on other grounds).= (501/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: ARCHSTONE SOUTH MARKET, LLC VS. KING LEI AND ALLAN CHU INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING et al

rulings.Case Title: SOJOURN PROERTIES INC. VS. LARRY KIMZEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 18, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT LARRY KIMZEY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint on file contains verification page and Proof of Service executed under penalty of perjury attest that a true copy of the First Amended Complaint was served on Defendant. = (501/PJB)
